settings.heading: peptide therapy has been gatekept for too long

settings.label: gray market vendors
settings.title: $40–150/month
settings.text: research chemicals from anonymous overseas sites, no physician oversight, no pharmacy quality control, no accountability.

settings.label: concierge clinics
settings.title: $500–1,500/month
settings.text: the same compounds plus consultations, lab panels, and overhead that prices you out.

settings.label: peptly
settings.title: $150–400/month
settings.text: physician-supervised, pharmacy-compounded, transparent pricing. the same quality at a fair price.

settings.heading: from questionnaire to delivery in under a week

settings.title: take the questionnaire
settings.text: 5 minutes, online. we ask about your health history, goals, and current medications.

settings.title: licensed physician reviews your case
settings.text: a real physician reviews your questionnaire and determines if peptide therapy is appropriate for you.

settings.title: compounded pharmacy fills your prescription
settings.text: your prescription is filled by a verified compounding pharmacy with third-party purity testing.

settings.title: discreet delivery to your door
settings.text: shipped in plain, temperature-controlled packaging. no branding on the outside.

settings.heading: the things we believe matter, we publish

settings.title: real physicians, named and credentialed
settings.text: every prescription is written by a licensed physician. not a nurse practitioner, not an algorithm.

settings.title: verified compounding pharmacy partner
settings.text: your peptides are compounded by a pharmacy that meets federal and state standards for sterile compounding.

settings.title: third-party purity certificates
settings.text: every batch is tested for identity, potency, and sterility. certificates of analysis are available on request.

settings.heading: ready to start?
settings.subheading: the questionnaire takes 5 minutes. there's no commitment until your physician approves your protocol.

settings.text: physician-supervised. pharmacy-compounded. delivered to your door.
